title: Mouse in Space!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo becomes a secret agent and rockets into space to stop an evil rodent's plan to rob New Mouse City! 🚀

q.en: Who is the editor and publisher of The Rodent's Gazette?
q.zh: 谁是《 鼠民公报》的编辑兼出版人？

explain.en: Geronimo says, 'I'm the editor of The Rodent's Gazette, the most famouse newspaper on Mouse Island.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说：“我是老鼠岛上最有名的报纸《 鼠民公报》的编辑。”

q.en: What did Geronimo grab to protect himself from the two intruders?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩抓起了什么东西来保护自己，对付那两个闯入者？

explain.en: He writes, 'Unfortunately, it wasn't a BASEBALL BAT. It was my slipper.'
explain.zh: 他写道：“可惜那不是棒球棍，而是我的拖鞋。”

q.en: What is Geronimo's secret agent code name?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的特工代号是什么？

explain.en: After reading the note he realizes, 'OOG was my code name.'
explain.zh: 读完字条后他意识到：“OOG 是我的代号。”

q.en: Who is Geronimo's secret agent friend with the code name OOK?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩那位代号为 OOK 的特工朋友是谁？

explain.en: The book states: 'NAME: Kornelius von Kickpaw / CODE NAME: OOK.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“姓名：科尼利厄斯·冯·基克爪 / 代号：OOK。”

q.en: What surprise was hidden inside Geronimo's cream cheese breakfast cookie?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的奶油奶酪早餐饼干里藏着什么惊喜？

options.en: A strange metallic capsule with a note
options.zh: 一颗藏有字条的奇怪金属胶囊

explain.en: 'Hidden in the middle of the cookie was a STRANGE metallic capsule, which held a STRANGE note inside.'
explain.zh: “饼干中间藏着一颗奇怪的金属胶囊，里面有一张奇怪的字条。”

q.en: Who sold Geronimo the SAFE SQUEAK antitheft devices?
q.zh: 是谁卖给杰罗尼摩“安全吱吱”防盗设备的？

explain.en: He notices 'a SAFE SQUEAK pin on her jacket, and below it, in small print, the name Suzy Slyrat.'
explain.zh: 他注意到“她夹克上别着安全吱吱的徽章，下面小字印着：苏西·斯莱鼠”。

q.en: What does the secret organization M.I.S.S.O. stand for?
q.zh: 秘密组织 M.I.S.S.O. 的全称是什么？

options.zh: 老鼠岛入侵安全系统办公室
老鼠岛太空安全办公室

explain.en: The book explains: 'M.I.S.S.O., as in Mouse Island Secret Service Organization.'
explain.zh: 书中解释道：“M.I.S.S.O.，即老鼠岛特工组织。”

q.en: What is the name of the spaceship Geronimo and his friends launch on?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和朋友们乘坐发射的太空船叫什么名字？

explain.en: After boarding, Geronimo says, 'I boarded RATOLLO 16, took my seat, and buckled my seat belt.'
explain.zh: 登船时杰罗尼摩说：“我上了 RATOLLO 16 号，坐好并系上了安全带。”

q.en: Who is the evil masked rodent terrorizing New Mouse City?
q.zh: 那个恐吓老鼠岛的邪恶蒙面老鼠是谁？

explain.en: The villain announces, 'The name's Dr. Wicked Whiskers. But everyone just calls me Dr. Wicked.'
explain.zh: 反派宣称：“我叫坏胡子博士，不过大家都叫我坏胡子。”

q.en: How did Geronimo signal for help when trapped on the fake asteroid?
q.zh: 被困在假小行星上时，杰罗尼摩是怎样发出求救信号的？

options.en: By pounding SOS in Morse code on the metal walls
options.zh: 用摩斯密码在金属墙上敲出 SOS

options.en: By shouting as loud as he could

explain.en: 'Three short sounds, then three long, then three short. It was the SOS message in Morse code.'
explain.zh: “三声短、三声长、再三声短，那是摩斯密码的 SOS 求救信号。”
